title: The Target Trap
content: I have a complicated relationship with Target. I've gone in for toothpaste and left with a throw blanket, three candles, and organizational bins I don't need. Multiple times. Now I have a Target budget line item. Seriously. Know thyself.
extended_content: At first I was embarrassed to have a 'Target' line in my budget. Seemed ridiculous. But you know what? It works. I know I'm going to walk down those dollar spot aisles. I know I'm going to see something cute. So now I budget for it. $50 a month. When it's gone, it's gone. The guilt is gone too.
lesson: Budget for who you are, not who you think you should be
